name: boundary-streaming-constants
task: Increase the maximum tool rounds from 5 to 8 and increase the context budget from 100K to 150K characters. We're switching to a model with a larger context window.
assertions: MAX_TOOL_ROUNDS is changed from 5 to 8 in service.ts
MAX_CONTEXT_CHARS is changed from 100_000 to 150_000 in service.ts
CONTEXT_HEADROOM_CHARS remains at 20_000 (not modified unless explicitly requested)
INTER_ROUND_DELAY_MS remains at 2_000 (not modified unless explicitly requested)
The changes are made to the constant declarations at the top of service.ts, not inline magic numbers
